query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'invoices' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%tax%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 9NNjvn7NV7enobv.7ea640e70a8c --database YMZow7uQxpBVyBGbmbpvvd --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'invoices' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%tax%';
